title: Pumpkin Witch House
description: Adds a spooky witch house, shaped like a giant pumpkin, filled with witches and hidden loot
body:
This mod adds a spooky witch house, shaped like a giant pumpkin, filled with witches and hidden loot

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cf4d6f37ae05ce0f1c08687eac72d7405f95a6d.jpeg)

Inside, you’ll find:

- Witches living inside the pumpkin
- Hidden loot and brewing supplies
- A mysterious and cozy atmosphere

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ac299281ee3740d8a9ab4d0d448b954b2670d7.jpeg)


The Pumpkin Witch House generates naturally in Forest, Taiga, Dark Forest, and Swamp biomes.




Feel free to put it in your modpack!
